loop1.title: Context Rail Header (Overview / Section / Feeder)
loop1.note: Supply-side members (Solar Incomers, Transformers) are dark (has_data=N) and will render as honest-blanks; only fed feeders (UPS, BPDB) report live data.

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing live power distribution for 6 active feeders; 2 incomers and 2 UPS feeders are dark (no data) and render as blank rows per roster spec.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Narrative text is generated from the panel's active power and voltage rollup; per-member roster slots are bound to the panel aggregate as individual member tables are not queried for narrative generation.

loop1.title: Total Feeder Consumption / Supply
loop1.note: Showing live total feeder consumption and per-feeder breakdown. Contracted capacity (denominator) is unknown for this asset, so the consumed percentage is not calculated.

loop1.title: Consumption Trend / Supply Trend
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate consumption trend; per-member breakdown is not measured for this asset (member tables are stubs).

loop1.title: Quick Stats
loop1.note: Panel aggregate stats are computed from 6 active feeders (GIC-01-N3 to GIC-02-N5); 2 feeders (GIC-02-N6, GIC-02-N7) are dark and honest-blank their per-member contributions.
